Description: Key equation, chemical or physical, evaluated in this step.
Attrition Scrubbing: N/A (mechanical). However, inputs to this step are: crushed claystone, recycled coarse materials, recycled water, and makeup water. Assuming a target of ~20 wt% solids, a grain density of 2.6 t/m3 and water density of 1 t/m3. r_mix = 1 / (w_s / rho_s + (1 - w_s) / (rho_water)) --> phi_s = w_s/rho_s * r_mix ≈ 0.08772. Assuming 20% of this comes from the recycling in step 3, we have a conversion factor of ≈0.070
Acid Leaching (at ~33 wt% solids after a: Acid leaching of Li-bearing clays (simplified): Li₂O·nSiO₂·mH₂O (s) + H₂SO₄ (aq) → Li₂SO₄ (aq) + nSiO₂ (s) + (m+1)H₂O. Other gangue elements (Al, Mg, Ca, Fe) form soluble sulfates or secondary solids.
Neutralization: Two neutralizations (pH 0->4, gypsum, Fe/Al precip) + (ph 4->6.5, Ca/Mg/B): e.g. CaCO₃ + H₂SO₄ → CaSO₄·2H₂O(s) + CO₂↑
Primary CCD / Leach Residue Thickening (: N/A (multi-stage CCD solid–liquid separation and washing; no net chemistry beyond minor neutralization). Not present in Thacker Pass but in TLC, Bonnie Claire, previous Thacker pass disclosures.
Impurity Removal: Impurity precipitation / neutralization, e.g. Fe³⁺ + 3OH⁻ → Fe(OH)₃(s); Mg²⁺ + CO₃²⁻ → MgCO₃(s); Ca²⁺ + CO₃²⁻ → CaCO₃(s); Al³⁺ + 3OH⁻ → Al(OH)₃(s). Lithium remains mostly in solution.

Crushing: Primary & secondary crushing, generates crushed ore for wet circuit
Classification: Hydrocyclones+screens to split coarse vs fine; assume coarse refeed to achieve input/output; fines feed thickener
Thickening (to ~55 wt% solids leach feed: Concentration of slurry, recovery of process water
Acid Leaching (at ~33 wt% solids after a: Heated or ambient acid leach in agitated tanks or pachuca-type reactors; converts Li-bearing minerals to soluble Li sulfate solution while leaving gangue largely solid; output is leach slurry (solution + residue).
Primary CCD / Leach Residue Thickening (: Counter-current decantation (CCD) of leach slurry to separate pregnant Li solution from residual solids and wash entrained Li from residue; produces pregnant leach solution (PLS) and leach residue to tailings.
Impurity Removal: Chemical removal of impurities (Mg, Ca, Fe, Al, etc.) via pH adjustment and precipitation; produces purified Li solution for downstream recovery and an impurity sludge for disposal.

Neutralization: Khakmardan 2024, Thacker Pass disclosure, Bonnie Claire disclosure (2024), TLC disclosure
Primary CCD / Leach Residue Thickening (: Khakmardan 2024, Thacker Pass disclosure, Bonnie Claire disclosure (2024), TLC disclosure
Impurity Removal: Khakmardan 2024, Thacker Pass disclosure, Bonnie Claire disclosure (2024), TLC disclosure
